zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Maud de Waterville於1048年出生在英國素可易亞斯特 格林斯亞德時，她的父親William de Waterville26歲，母親Thoremina Roos19歲。她於大約1068年與Ralph de Chesney在英國素可韋斯特 霍阿利結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1085年在英國英格蘭諾福爾可享年37歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Maud de Waterville于1048年出生在英国素可易亞斯特 格林斯亞德时，她的父亲William de Waterville26岁，母亲Thoremina Roos19岁。她于大约1068年与Ralph de Chesney在英国素可韋斯特 霍阿利结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1085年在英国英格兰諾福爾可享年37岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Maud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Matilda . This form was characteristically Low German (i.e. including medieval Dutch and Flemish). The wife of William the Conqueror , who bore this name, was the daughter of Baldwin , Count of Flanders. In Flemish and Dutch the letter -t- was generally lost when it occurred between vowels, giving forms such as Ma(h)auld. Maud or Matilda was also the name of the daughter ( 1102–67 ) of Henry I of England; she was married early in life to the Holy Roman Emperor Henry V , and later disputed the throne of England with her cousin Stephen . In 1128 she married Geoffrey , Count of Anjou. A medieval chronicler commented, ‘she was a good woman, but she had little bliss with him’. The name Maud became quite common in England in the 19th century, when its popularity was influenced in part by Tennyson's poem Maud, published in 1855 , but has not been much used since the early decades of the 20th century.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Maud de Waterville was born in 1048, in East Grinstead, Sussex, England, her father, William de Waterville, was 26 and her mother, Thoremina Roos, was 19. She married Ralph de Chesney about 1068, in West Hoathly, Sussex, England. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1085, in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 37.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Maud de Waterville est née en 1048, à East Grinstead, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, William de Waterville, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Thoremina Roos, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Ralph de Chesney environ 1068, à West Hoathly, Sussex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1085, à Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 37 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Maud de Waterville 1048 in East Grinstead, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Waterville 26 und ihre Mutter Thoremina Roos 19. Sie hat um 1068 in West Hoathly, Sussex, England Ralph de Chesney geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1085 im Alter von 37 Jahren in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Maud de Waterville è nata il nel 1048 nel East Grinstead, Sussex, England, sua padre, William de Waterville, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Thoremina Roos, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Ralph de Chesney circa 1068, nel West Hoathly, Sussex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1085, nel Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 37 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Maud de Watervilleが1048年にイギリススセックスエアスト グリンステアドで生まれた時，父William de Watervilleは26歳，母Thoremina Roosは19歳であった。約1068年にイギリススセックスウエスト ホーアスリーでRalph de Chesneyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1085年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクで37歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Maud de Waterville(이)가 1048년 영국 수세스 이스트 그린스테아드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Waterville(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Thoremina Roos(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 대략 1068년 영국 수세스 웨스트 호슬리에서 Ralph de Chesney(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1085년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크에서 37세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Westhampnett, Sussex, England: Westhampnett, Sūþsēaxe, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Maud de Waterville nasceu em 1048, em East Grinstead, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Waterville, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Thoremina Roos, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Ralph de Chesney aproximadamente 1068, em West Hoathly, Sussex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1085, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 37 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Maud de Waterville родилась в 1048 г. в местности эаст гринстид, суссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени William de Waterville было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Thoremina Roos, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ralph de Chesney около 1068 г. в местности вест хоатли, суссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1085 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 37 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Maud de Waterville nació en 1048, en East Grinstead, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Waterville, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Thoremina Roos, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Ralph de Chesney aproximadamente 1068, en West Hoathly, Sussex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1085, en Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 37 años.
